philosophers_stone.title: Craft the Philosopher's Stone (Divine/PTD — Mass Accumulate 999 souls → Homunculus chain → Stone)

stone_choice.title: Decide what you will do with it — the Philosopher's Stone amplifies alchemy beyond natural limits

subtitle.text: Edward Elric refused to use it. You have to make your own choice.

description: 999 villager souls. Each soul is a person.
The MCA Reborn villagers in your settlement are people.
The 999 souls are not abstract — they are the kind of people you spent Ch12-16 building a world for.
Amplified alchemy. Access to processes that are otherwise impossible.
The Stone is required for certain Divine/PTD endgame recipes.
Edward refused the stone when offered.
Hohenheim used the stones he carried to counter Father.
Three different answers to the same object.
Sinborn does not judge your answer.
The stone is real in this world.
What you do with it is your civilization's first truly defining choice.
